description: React component implementing a responsive sidebar navigation for a Next.js e-commerce frontend, including persistent collapsed state, mobile overlay, and icon mapping.

methods.name: readPersistedCollapsed
methods.description: Reads sidebar collapsed state from localStorage, returning false if unavailable or on server.

methods.name: writePersistedCollapsed
methods.description: Persists the collapsed state to localStorage, ignoring errors.

methods.name: renderLink
methods.description: Renders individual navigation link with icon and label, adapted for collapsed mode.

methods.name: renderSidebarContent
methods.description: Builds the sidebar's sections and links, respecting collapsed state.
